name: Trophic
description: Predator-prey, herbivory, and frugivory interactions. Who eats whom.

name: Seed Dispersal
description: Animal-mediated seed dispersal. The keystone story for orangutans, hornbills, gibbons, and flying foxes.

name: Pollination
description: Pollinator-plant mutualism, including the obligate Ceratosolen-fig wasp partnership.

name: Habitat Facilitation
description: Mycorrhizal seedling establishment, nest tree provision, and hornbill cavity nesting.
